description: Create comparison landing pages (Cost-Smart vs Excel, Cost-Smart vs YNAB) targeting users actively comparing solutions, and persona-targeted landing pages for Freelancers and Budget-Conscious users. These are SEO content pages that highlight Cost-Smart's advantages and funnel visitors toward Pro conversion.
steps: Create app/compare/cost-smart-vs-excel/page.tsx - A detailed comparison page following the existing comparison page pattern (see app/compare/ppf-vs-fd/ for structure). Include: metadata with SEO title/description, a comparison table (features like ease of use, automation, templates, mobile access, collaboration, data security, cost), pros/cons of each, a verdict section recommending Cost-Smart Pro for anyone wanting more than basic tracking, and a CTA to /pricing. Use the existing Card components and styling.

Create app/compare/cost-smart-vs-ynab/page.tsx - Similar comparison page for YNAB. Highlight: Cost-Smart's free tier vs YNAB's $14.99/month, simpler interface, India-focused features, calculator suite. Acknowledge YNAB's strengths (envelope budgeting, goal tracking) but position Cost-Smart Pro at $4.99/month as the affordable alternative with AI insights.

Update app/compare/page.tsx to add the two new comparisons to the comparisons array. Add entries for 'Cost-Smart vs Excel' (slug: 'cost-smart-vs-excel', icon: FileText, color: 'emerald') and 'Cost-Smart vs YNAB' (slug: 'cost-smart-vs-ynab', icon: TrendingUp, color: 'blue').

Create app/for/freelancers/page.tsx - A persona landing page for freelancers following the pattern in app/for/homebuyers/page.tsx. Include: hero with freelancer-specific messaging ('Simple Financial Management for Freelancers'), problem statement (separating business/personal expenses, tax prep stress), tool links to relevant calculators (profit margin, invoice generator, income tax, GST), testimonial placeholder section, email capture section, and Pro CTA highlighting unlimited budgets and data export for tax advisors.

Create app/for/budget-savvy/page.tsx - A persona landing page for budget-conscious users (Ben persona). Include: hero messaging ('Take Control of Your Money'), problem statement (salary disappearing, student loans, no savings), links to relevant calculators (debt payoff, emergency fund, SIP, retirement), a section showing the journey from free to Pro, email capture, and Pro CTA highlighting advanced reporting and unlimited budgets.
acceptance_criteria: app/compare/cost-smart-vs-excel/page.tsx renders a full comparison page with table, pros/cons, verdict, and CTA
app/compare/cost-smart-vs-ynab/page.tsx renders a full comparison page with competitive positioning
app/compare/page.tsx index lists the two new comparison pages
app/for/freelancers/page.tsx renders a persona landing page with freelancer-specific messaging and tools
app/for/budget-savvy/page.tsx renders a persona landing page with budget-focused messaging and tools
All pages have proper Next.js Metadata exports with SEO-friendly title and description
All pages use canonical URLs via alternates metadata
verification: Run npx next build from /projects/sandbox/cost-smart and confirm no errors
Verify TypeScript types are correct by checking build output for type errors
